message:
feat(vdbe): RowidLookupSelect JIT template for hot rowid-equality SELECTs (bd-lezm3)

First slice of PERF-W6-1 Cranelift JIT: adds compiled template for the
most common prepared SELECT pattern (SELECT cols FROM t WHERE rowid = ?).
Pattern-matches SeekRowid/NotExists+Column+ResultRow opcode sequences,
resolves register sources, and dispatches through execute_compiled_program
bypassing the interpreter loop entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
